name: career-coaching-calls
title: Career Coaching Hotline Call Logs
description: Call patterns, escalation tracking, and coaching analytics from the Career Coaching Hotline. Tracks career stage distribution, Careerspan conversions, and topic analysis for continuous improvement.

sources.name: vapi_webhook
sources.description: VAPI webhook integration for Career Coaching Hotline calls

sources.name: fillout_intake
sources.description: Fillout form intake for caller profiles

resources.name: calls
resources.description: Call log with career stage assessment and topic tracking

resources.name: daily_analysis
resources.description: Daily LLM-generated analysis of call patterns and career stage trends

resources.name: caller_profiles
resources.description: Caller profiles from Fillout intake form

resources.name: caller_insights
resources.description: Merged caller intelligence from calls and profiles

privacy.description: Calls table stores anonymous patterns. Caller profiles contain PII with explicit consent. Escalations contain contact info for Careerspan follow-up.
privacy.pii_policy: PII exists in caller_profiles and escalations only, with explicit user consent via Fillout intake form.
privacy.escalation_policy: Escalation contact info used solely for Careerspan booking follow-up.
